'''鈭歞h-h-z''' ('''kadhahaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stalwartize|stalwartize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stalwartize|stalwartize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-h-z
|-
! Lemma
| kadhahaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhahaz|thidhahaz]] || [[word:jidhahaz|jidhahaz]] || [[word:shidhahaz|shidhahaz]] || [[word:kidhahaz|kidhahaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhahaz|thuthudhahaz]] || [[word:jujudhahaz|jujudhahaz]] || [[word:shushudhahaz|shushudhahaz]] || [[word:kukudhahaz|kukudhahaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhahaz|thudhahaz]] || [[word:judhahaz|judhahaz]] || [[word:shudhahaz|shudhahaz]] || [[word:kudhahaz|kudhahaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhahaz|thudhahaz]] || [[word:judhahaz|judhahaz]] || [[word:shudhahaz|shudhahaz]] || [[word:kudhahaz|kudhahaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhahaz|thedhahaz]] || [[word:jedhahaz|jedhahaz]] || [[word:shedhahaz|shedhahaz]] || [[word:kedhahaz|kedhahaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhahaz|thothodhahaz]] || [[word:jojodhahaz|jojodhahaz]] || [[word:shoshodhahaz|shoshodhahaz]] || [[word:kokodhahaz|kokodhahaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhahaz|thodhahaz]] || [[word:jodhahaz|jodhahaz]] || [[word:shodhahaz|shodhahaz]] || [[word:kodhahaz|kodhahaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhahaz|thodhahaz]] || [[word:jodhahaz|jodhahaz]] || [[word:shodhahaz|shodhahaz]] || [[word:kodhahaz|kodhahaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]] || [[word:dhahaz|dhahaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhahaz|th忙dhahaz]] || [[word:j忙dhahaz|j忙dhahaz]] || [[word:sh忙dhahaz|sh忙dhahaz]] || [[word:k忙dhahaz|k忙dhahaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhahaz|thathadhahaz]] || [[word:jajadhahaz|jajadhahaz]] || [[word:shashadhahaz|shashadhahaz]] || [[word:kakadhahaz|kakadhahaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhahaz|thadhahaz]] || [[word:jadhahaz|jadhahaz]] || [[word:shadhahaz|shadhahaz]] || [[word:kadhahaz|kadhahaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhahaz|thadhahaz]] || [[word:jadhahaz|jadhahaz]] || [[word:shadhahaz|shadhahaz]] || [[word:kadhahaz|kadhahaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhahaz|shadhahaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhahaz|goshadhahaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhahaz|gokishadhahaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhahazn眉|shadhahazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkn眉|goshadhahaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhahazn眉|gokishadhahazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhahazsh毛|shadhahazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhahaznksh毛|goshadhahaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhahazsh毛|gokishadhahazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhahazro|shadhahazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkro|goshadhahaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhahazro|gokishadhahazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhahazmu|shadhahazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkmu|goshadhahaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhahazmu|gokishadhahazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhahazsher|shadhahazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhahaznksher|goshadhahaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhahazsher|gokishadhahazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhahazng|shadhahazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkng|goshadhahaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhahazng|gokishadhahazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhahazya|shadhahazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkya|goshadhahaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhahazya|gokishadhahazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhahazyam|shadhahazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkyam|goshadhahaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhahazyam|gokishadhahazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhahazn眉sh毛|shadhahazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkn眉sh毛|goshadhahaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhahazn眉sh毛|gokishadhahazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhahazn眉ro|shadhahazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkn眉ro|goshadhahaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhahazn眉ro|gokishadhahazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhahazn眉mu|shadhahazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkn眉mu|goshadhahaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhahazn眉mu|gokishadhahazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhahazsh毛n眉|shadhahazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhahaznksh毛n眉|goshadhahaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhahazsh毛n眉|gokishadhahazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhahazsh毛ro|shadhahazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhahaznksh毛ro|goshadhahaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhahazsh毛ro|gokishadhahazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhahazsh毛mu|shadhahazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhahaznksh毛mu|goshadhahaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhahazsh毛mu|gokishadhahazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhahazron眉|shadhahazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkron眉|goshadhahaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhahazron眉|gokishadhahazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhahazrosh毛|shadhahazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkrosh毛|goshadhahaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhahazrosh毛|gokishadhahazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhahazromu|shadhahazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkromu|goshadhahaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhahazromu|gokishadhahazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhahazmun眉|shadhahazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkmun眉|goshadhahaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhahazmun眉|gokishadhahazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhahazmush毛|shadhahazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkmush毛|goshadhahaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhahazmush毛|gokishadhahazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhahazmuro|shadhahazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhahaznkmuro|goshadhahaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhahazmuro|gokishadhahazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
